---
title: "Divij Chokhani"
image: "files/my_photo.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:dchokhani@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/divijchokhani
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-dchokhani
---

Welcome to my website!
